rows.content: There may be times when you want to perform another SPF/PC function without
terminating the current function.  SPF/PC provides the ability to split the
display screen into two logical screens that operate independently from
each other, as though they were separate sessions.
In split screen mode, only one of the split screens is considered active
at any point in time.  Any interrupt, such as using ENTER or a PF key,
is interpreted as having meaning for the active logical screen.  The current
location of the cursor identifies which of the logical screens is active.
To switch from one logical screen to another, use the SWAP command.
